name: Scalloped Onions and Peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onions and cook in boiling salted water until tender. Drain and slice.
2. In a saucepan, melt the fat over low heat. Add the flour and stir until smooth.
3. Gradually whisk in the milk, stirring constantly to avoid lumps. Return to heat
and simmer gently until thickened.
4. Stir in the salt, peanuts, and sliced onions.
5. Place half of the onion mixture into a greased baking dish. Scatter with peanut
s and top with sauce.
6. Sprinkle remaining onion mixture over the peanuts and sauce.
7. Pour buttered bread crumbs evenly over the top.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20 minutes, or until the bread crumbs are g
olden brown.
9. Serve directly from the baking dish.
